source_rationale: KRT7 is a cytokeratin marking simple epithelial cells, highly expressed in airway epithelium
KRT17 marks basal-like epithelial cells and is associated with airway basal progenitors
KRT19 is a luminal epithelial marker expressed in airway epithelial cells
CDH1 (E-cadherin) is a hallmark of epithelial cell identity and cell-cell adhesion
MMP7 is expressed by airway epithelial cells and involved in tissue remodeling
TACSTD2 (TROP2) is an epithelial surface antigen marking progenitor-like epithelial cells
ELF3 is an epithelial-specific transcription factor important in airway differentiation
GPRC5A is a lung epithelial marker associated with airway epithelial homeostasis
CD24 is a surface glycoprotein expressed on epithelial progenitor cells
CLDN4 is a tight junction protein characteristic of differentiated epithelial cells

WDFY4 is specifically expressed in conventional dendritic cells type 1 (cDC1)
